Our Services in Norcross

Full-spectrum tax and immigration services — right here in Norcross, GA.

US Tax Filing & Preparation

Federal & state returns for individuals, self-employed, and businesses. Maximum refund guaranteed.

Learn more

US Immigration Consulting

H-1B, L-1, EB-1, green card, and citizenship services with a 98% approval rate.

Learn more

Visa Services

H-1B, L-1, B-1/B-2, F-1, O-1 visas — complete petition and interview prep.

Learn more

Business Registration

LLC, Corporation, EIN, registered agent — launch your US business right.

Learn more

Bookkeeping & Accounting

Monthly reconciliation, P&L, payroll processing, and year-end financials.

Learn more

IRS Audit Representation

IRS-enrolled agents represent you directly before the IRS — no stress.

Why Choose Us

The Most Trusted Tax & Immigration
Firm in Norcross, GA

  • IRS-enrolled agents — highest credential for tax representation
  • Immigration specialists with 98% visa approval rate
  • Founded 2009 — 15+ years serving the Atlanta metro area
  • Transparent flat-fee pricing — no hourly billing surprises
  • Year-round audit protection on every return we file
  • Bilingual staff — English, Hindi, and other languages available
  • Free 30-minute initial consultation — zero obligation

Norcross Tax & Immigration FAQs

Yes. We serve individuals and businesses in Norcross, GA with comprehensive tax preparation, IRS representation, and business tax planning. Norcross is approximately 10 minutes from our Lilburn office, and virtual consultations are available for your convenience.
Absolutely. Norcross has a large technology and professional workforce. We provide end-to-end H-1B, L-1, and EB-1 visa consulting for professionals in Norcross and surrounding Technology Park area employers.
